nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for lesson planning
nodes.grounding_span: having AI do a bit of a double check on things has been helpful

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner for student engagement
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate substitute for colleague collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: when it comes to brainstorming it comes from moments where I see my students struggling

nodes.label: AI use in assessment and homework creation
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use AI to create assessments or homework for my students

nodes.label: AI as substitute for colleague collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: AI kind of helps to fill that gap

nodes.label: AI's lack of contextual and emotional knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: AI has never been in a classroom and lacks the emotional knowledge that a teacher has

nodes.label: AI as tool for generating engaging materials
nodes.label_negative: AI as generator of incomplete or inaccurate outputs
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has been able to really create some interesting and engaging stories

nodes.label: AI's pattern recognition vs. education's unpredictability
nodes.label_negative: Human adaptability to unique classroom situations
nodes.grounding_span: AI is built to recognize patterns, but in education patterns don't really exist

nodes.label: Professional integrity and modeling for students
nodes.grounding_span: it does not seem quite fair for me to only use my own work 80-90% of the time

nodes.label: Human connection and shared understanding
nodes.grounding_span: feeling seen and understood by them is something AI could never replace

nodes.label: Efficiency and time management
nodes.grounding_span: I have only so many minutes in my work day

nodes.label: Student-centered teaching and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: one size does not fit all in education

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: having AI do a bit of a double check on things has been helpful

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for assessments due to fairness
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use AI to create assessments or homework for my students

nodes.label: Preference for human collaboration over AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would spend all of my time collaborating with my collogues

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-generated engaging materials
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has been able to really create some interesting and engaging stories

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's role in education beyond materials
nodes.grounding_span: I do not think that AI can replace the human-ness of education

nodes.label: Purposeful tool-oriented interaction with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do not typically chat with AI like they are a real person, I use it like it is a tool

nodes.label: Critical awareness and verification of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: making sure I am highly aware and critical of anything AI produces for me
